result.stdout:
Description:
  Kubernetes secret configuration helper

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  pull <secret>       Pulls secrets from kubernetes to a local file
  push <file>         Pushes secrets from a local file into kubernetes
  backup              Pulls all secrets in the cluster
  restore <folder>    Pushes all secrets in a given folder
  find <search-term>  Searches for a value across all secrets in the cluster
  update-value        Replaces a value across all matching secrets in the cluster

commands.payload:
Description:
  Kubernetes secret configuration helper

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  pull <secret>       Pulls secrets from kubernetes to a local file
  push <file>         Pushes secrets from a local file into kubernetes
  backup              Pulls all secrets in the cluster
  restore <folder>    Pushes all secrets in a given folder
  find <search-term>  Searches for a value across all secrets in the cluster
  update-value        Replaces a value across all matching secrets in the cluster

result.stdout:
Description:
  Pulls all secrets in the cluster

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec backup [options]

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                        The kubectl config context to use
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                    The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -i, --namespace-includes <namespace-includes>  The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes
  -rgx, --namespace-regex <namespace-regex>      The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes
  -e, --excluded-namespace <excluded-namespace>  A list of namespaces that should not be included in the backup
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Searches for a value across all secrets in the cluster

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec find <search-term> [options]

Arguments:
  <search-term>  The text to search for in secrets

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                        The kubectl config context to use
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                    The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -i, --namespace-includes <namespace-includes>  The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes
  -rgx, --namespace-regex <namespace-regex>      The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Pulls secrets from kubernetes to a local file

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec pull <secret> [options]

Arguments:
  <secret>  The name of the secret in kubernetes

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                      The kubectl config context to use
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                  The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -o, --output <output>                        The file to write to
  -u, --unwrap-key <unwrap-key>                Unwrap a specific key (so we only output the value of this key)
  -p, --port-forward                           Will run port-forwards and replace any Kubernetes service URLs in the config (requires the unwrap-key option as well)
  -r, --remove-json-field <remove-json-field>  Will delete the listed fields from the unwrapped json secret value (requires the unwrap-key option as well)
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Pulls secrets from kubernetes to a local file

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec pull <secret> [options]

Arguments:
  <secret>  The name of the secret in kubernetes

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                      The kubectl config context to use
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                  The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -o, --output <output>                        The file to write to
  -u, --unwrap-key <unwrap-key>                Unwrap a specific key (so we only output the value of this key)
  -p, --port-forward                           Will run port-forwards and replace any Kubernetes service URLs in the config (requires the unwrap-key option as well)
  -r, --remove-json-field <remove-json-field>  Will delete the listed fields from the unwrapped json secret value (requires the unwrap-key option as well)
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Pushes secrets from a local file into kubernetes

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec push <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The file to read from

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                 The kubectl config context to use
  -s, --secret <secret>                   The name of the secret in kubernetes
  -n, --namespace <namespace>             The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -sp, --skip-prompts                     Will not ask for confirmation before pushing secret
  -acmn, --auto-create-missing-namespace  Will automatically create the namespace if it does not exist
  -?, -h, --help                          Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Pushes secrets from a local file into kubernetes

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec push <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The file to read from

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                 The kubectl config context to use
  -s, --secret <secret>                   The name of the secret in kubernetes
  -n, --namespace <namespace>             The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -sp, --skip-prompts                     Will not ask for confirmation before pushing secret
  -acmn, --auto-create-missing-namespace  Will automatically create the namespace if it does not exist
  -?, -h, --help                          Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Pushes all secrets in a given folder

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec restore <folder> [options]

Arguments:
  <folder>  The folder containing all the secret files to push

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                  The kubectl config context to use
  -r, --recursive                          Will recursively push secrets
  -sp, --skip-prompts                      Will not ask for confirmation before pushing secrets
  -acmn, --auto-create-missing-namespaces  Will automatically create missing namespaces when pushing secrets
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Pushes all secrets in a given folder

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec restore <folder> [options]

Arguments:
  <folder>  The folder containing all the secret files to push

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                  The kubectl config context to use
  -r, --recursive                          Will recursively push secrets
  -sp, --skip-prompts                      Will not ask for confirmation before pushing secrets
  -acmn, --auto-create-missing-namespaces  Will automatically create missing namespaces when pushing secrets
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Replaces a value across all matching secrets in the cluster

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec update-value [options]

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                        The kubectl config context to use
  --old <old>                                    The old value to search for and replace
  --new <new>                                    The new value to replace with
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                    The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -i, --namespace-includes <namespace-includes>  The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes
  -rgx, --namespace-regex <namespace-regex>      The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes
  -sp, --skip-prompts                            Will not ask for confirmation before updating secrets
  -dr, --dry-run                                 Show what would be changed without making actual changes
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Replaces a value across all matching secrets in the cluster

Usage:
  Likvido.Kubesec update-value [options]

Options:
  -c, --context <context>                        The kubectl config context to use
  --old <old>                                    The old value to search for and replace
  --new <new>                                    The new value to replace with
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                    The namespace of services in kubernetes
  -i, --namespace-includes <namespace-includes>  The namespace keyword of services in kubernetes
  -rgx, --namespace-regex <namespace-regex>      The namespace regex to search for services in kubernetes
  -sp, --skip-prompts                            Will not ask for confirmation before updating secrets
  -dr, --dry-run                                 Show what would be changed without making actual changes
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information
